icon.$description: Primitive icon size scale. Five steps covering inline glyph (12px) through standalone large icon (32px). All values align to the 4px grid. Reference through semantic icon tokens (icon.size.*) in UI code — never directly.

xs.$description: 12px. Inline glyph size — icon inside a badge, status dot, or tight metadata row.

sm.$description: 16px. Compact icon — inline with small labels, input prefix/suffix icons, tight toolbar icons. Minimum size for interactive icons.

md.$description: 20px. Standard icon — default for most UI icons beside labels (nav items, button icons, list row glyphs). Pairs with font.label.medium.

lg.$description: 24px. Prominent icon — section header icons, standalone icon buttons. Pairs with font.label.large.

xl.$description: 32px. Large standalone icon — feature highlights, empty state graphics. Not for inline-with-text use.
